nodes.label: Concept: quiz question with options + correctIndex
nodes.norm_label: concept: quiz question with options + correctindex

nodes.description: Level SVG icon component — 6 variants (SLEEPING, AWAKENING, OBSERVER, WARRIOR, STRATEGIST, MASTER)
F23.5 — Philosophy/History card showing era, thinker, school, idea, legacy
F22.6 — Quiz card with 4 multiple choice options and per-option analysis
Aurora background wrapper for ritual screens (determination, path, barrier)
F23.3 — Science card with title, metrics, context, source
F22.8 — Thread of time: yesterday/today/tomorrow nodes (sunrise/sun/sunset)
F26 — AI tutor chat bottom-sheet with socratic method
F22.9 — Wisdom card: large italic quote with author
F24.4 — Barrier 'Apply' stage: apply concepts to new situations
F24.8 — 5-step barrier progress indicator: recall→connect→apply→defend→verdict
F24.3 — Barrier 'Connect' stage: describe connections between concept pairs
F24.5 — Barrier 'Defend' stage: defend position through AI pressure rounds
F24.2 — Barrier 'Recall' stage: 6 short questions with green/yellow/red verdict
F24.6+F24.7 — Barrier result: passed (shimmer) or failed (weak topics list)
Web Share API button with clipboard fallback for profile sharing
Base Button primitive: primary/secondary/danger variants with forwardRef
Base Card primitive: div with sm/md/lg padding and glass surface styling
Empty state component with 5 presets: battles/achievements/history/modules/friends
PWA install prompt banner (shows after 3rd visit)
Full-screen network error modal with online event listener
Base Skeleton loader primitive (animate-pulse)
Card-shaped skeleton using Skeleton internally
Stats grid skeleton (4 cards) using Skeleton internally
Wrapper for swipe-to-dismiss behavior with localStorage persistence
Dark/light theme toggle (light theme pending)
Toast item with 5 types: xp/achievement/streak/info/error
Provider for toast notifications (max 3 stacked)
Hook for accessing toast context
Vitest unit tests for Button component
Vitest unit tests for Card component
Vitest unit tests for SideNav component with mocked next/navigation
Type for learning level keys used by LevelIcon
Union type: recall|connect|apply|defend|verdict
Verdict: green|yellow|red
Verdict: strong|weak|missed
Verdict: applied|partial|missed
Outcome: held|wavered|lost
Outcome: passed|failed
Toast type: xp|achievement|streak|info|error
EmptyState preset key: battles|achievements|history|modules|friends

React useEffect hook
React useRef hook
React forwardRef API
React createContext for ToastProvider
crypto.randomUUID() — used in TutorSheet for message IDs
Web Share API — used by ShareButton
Clipboard API — ShareButton fallback
localStorage — used by InstallBanner, ThemeToggle, SwipeToDismiss

Both learning cards with temporal/contextual framing

Both interactive assessment with verdict styling (green/red)
QuizCard uses raw button elements, bypassing Button primitive
RitualShell docstring says 'barrier screens' — wraps barrier stages
Both are container components wrapping children with atmospheric styling
Same learning-card family but different voice (science vs wisdom)
Same chat pattern: transcript + user/mentor messages + autoscroll via scrollRef
TutorSheet uses raw button elements, not Button primitive — inconsistency to flag
Both use textarea+grade+verdict pattern, same cold-blood styling
Same stage pattern with index/total indexing
Same textarea+verdict+multi-question pattern
DefendStage outcome triggers ResultScreen (verdict step)
Barrier stages don't reuse Button primitive
ShareButton is a bespoke component, not using Button primitive
Both are full-view status states with icon+title+message pattern
Both are non-blocking overlay notifications
SwipeToDismiss could wrap InstallBanner (both handle dismiss patterns)
Both are notification-style feedback UI for error states
